title: Helpful PvP Pack
description: Original Minecraft look with 40+ quality of life features, pvp focused improvements, bug fixes, and subtle changes for a smoother, more enjoyable vanilla experience.
body: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ## FEATURES ### Original Minecraft look but: ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### [Helpful Default Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/helpful-default-pack): - Smooth game + better fps - Bordered ores (including Ancient Debris) - No fog (all types) - Low fire - Low shield - Translucent pumpkin overlay - Clearer water - Visible powdered snow - Visible tripwire/string - Visible wither hearts - Visible trapped chest - Clean & noticeable potion particles - Clean end crystals - Brewing stand guide - Smaller totem - Smaller totem pop - Smaller totem pop particles - Scaffolding Visibility - Less rain and snow - Less totem pop particles - Less not needed particles - No sweeping edge particles - No hit particles - No explosion particles - Fixed rib armor trim color - Fixed dripleaf stem - Fixed panaroma look - Fixed decorated pot - Fixed blaze's rods bottom texture - Accurate axolotl buckets (1.21.5+) - Accurate painting items (1.21.5+) - Circular sun & moon - Notch enchanted golden apple - Noticeable enchant glint - 2x less world border lines - 1.21.5 spawn eggs ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### [Helpful PvP Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/helpful-pvp-pack) *(Currently viewing)*: **Includes all Helpful Default Pack features, with extra PvP improvements:** - Small side shield - TXF crosshair - Shorter swords - Cleaner Hotbar - Smooth XP bar - Transparent effect background - Clean & noticeable potion particles - No broken block & breaking block particles - No falling leaf particles - Animated pearls - Animated xp bottles - Cleaner Pots ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### DISCLAIMER: **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) does not support Full Brightness & No Fog** If you want those issues fixed, or you’re looking for more PvP options and improvements, consider downloading [BactroMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/bactromod) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### Recommended Redstone pack (if needed): - [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### My other resource packs: - [Accurate Cobweb Outline](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/accurate-cobweb-outline) - [Crispy Crits (Bass Boost)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/crispy-crits) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### Want to support me? You can! Simply join my Discord server (linked above) or follow this resource pack. Both are great ways to stay updated on changes and bug fixes.
